title: SSA Office Structure
description: JSON Structure documentation for SSA Field Office and Resident Station data records from the SSA Location API

fields.name: OFFICE_NAME
fields.description: Official full name of the SSA office or resident station

fields.name: ADDRESS_LINE_1
fields.description: Primary street address (street number and name)

fields.name: ADDRESS_LINE_2
fields.description: Secondary address: suite, room, floor, or building name

fields.name: CITY
fields.description: City where the office is located

fields.name: STATE
fields.description: Two-letter U.S. state abbreviation (e.g. CA, TX, NY)

fields.name: ZIP_CODE
fields.description: U.S. ZIP code (5 digits or ZIP+4 format)

fields.name: PHONE
fields.description: Main telephone number for public contact

fields.name: FAX
fields.description: Fax number (may be null for offices without fax)

fields.name: MONDAY_OPEN_TIME / MONDAY_CLOSE_TIME
fields.description: Monday office hours — open and close times. Null if closed or varies.

fields.name: LATITUDE_NUM
fields.description: Geographic latitude in decimal degrees (WGS 84 datum)

fields.name: LONGITUDE_NUM
fields.description: Geographic longitude in decimal degrees (WGS 84 datum)

fields.name: ObjectId
fields.description: ArcGIS Feature Service system identifier — unique primary key

arcgis_feature.description: ArcGIS Feature wrapper that includes the above attributes and a geometry object
